description_long: This is a sporty, wraparound pair of sunglasses featuring a robust, full-rim frame with a sleek, aerodynamic design. The frame is predominantly black with a smooth, slightly curved structure that hugs the face for a secure fit. The lenses are large, continuous, and have a striking mirrored red-orange tint, providing both style and sun protection. The temples are straight with a gentle taper and feature a white accent stripe along the length, adding a dynamic visual element. On the outer side of the right temple, there is a visible brand logo in white, enhancing the premium feel. The overall design suggests these glasses are intended for active urban use, such as cycling or running.
description: Sporty wraparound sunglasses with a black full-rim frame, mirrored red-orange lenses, and white-accented temples featuring a visible brand logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, mirrored red-orange lenses and the full-rim black frame.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the curved temple and the lens's mirrored effect.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the inside curvature of the frame and the straight, tapered temples.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the white accent stripe and the brand logo on the temple.
attribute_frame_design: The frame has a wraparound, aerodynamic shape with a full-rim structure that is thick and robust, providing a secure fit and sporty appearance. The temples are straight with a gentle taper and feature a dynamic accent stripe.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses have a mirrored red-orange tint with a gradient effect, offering high reflectivity and a bold, sporty look. The tint is opaque from the outside, obscuring the eyes.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a solid, integrated saddle style, smoothly connecting the two lenses with a gentle curve and no visible nose pads.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are straight, moderately thick, and feature a white accent stripe running along their length. The right temple displays a visible brand logo, adding a distinctive touch.
attribute_brand_logo: A white printed brand logo is visible on the outer side of the right temple.
